name: Saudi Ground Services Company
summary: Saudi Ground Services Company provides ground-handling services for passengers and aircraft in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It offers a range of passenger services, including arrival and transfer, passenger manifesting and seat allocation, station management, gate, and VIP services, as well as check-in services, such as boarding pass and baggage tagging, and load planning and pre-flight editing services. The company also provides baggage handling services comprising baggage sorting and transportation, and lost and found services; ramp services; cargo loading/offloading services; and fleet cleaning services, such as cabin grooming, deep cleaning, and turnaround cleaning, as well as water and toilet services. In addition, it offers operation services and traffic control services. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Jeddah, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Saudi Ground Services Company is a subsidiary of Saudi Arabian Airlines Corporation.
